title: KORBOND Stick & Sew White Hook and Loop Tape – 2cm x 50cm – Secure Fastening Solution for Crafting, Repairs, DIY, Upcycling and Projects – Self Adhesive
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories
Pack Contains: x 1 50cm Hook Tape & x 1 50cm Loop Tape

Combining two of Korbond’s most popular Hook & Loop products, Stick & Sew allows you to attach soft furnishings and fabrics to hard surfaces securely. Secure a cushion to a bench or fix blinds to the wall easily
The Korbond Range of Hook & Loop features 7 variations of Iron On, Stick On, Sew On and Combination packs as well as handy Hook & Loop Dots all in black or white options
Sew On Hook and Loop is washable and dry cleanable. Stick On Hook & Loop should not be laundered
description: From the manufacturer Korbond Hook & Loop Korbond Hook & Loop range is a complete collection of alternative fastenings. Quick and versatile, Hook and Loop allows application to a wide range of home furnishings, solid materials and general craft projects. Complete Range Korbond's range of Hook & Loop covers every fastening type, from fabric to fabric bonding, to bonding two solid surfaces. Not just for the experienced crafter who can sew on Hook & Loop with ease, Korbond's Stick On and Iron On variations ensure the range is inclusive to all abilities. Attach cushions to a bench, or create quick closures in hand crafted Halloween costumes. Secure Fastenings Korbond's expertly designed Hook & Loop ensures strong and secure but temporary fastenings, ensuring the Hook & Loop only separates when physically removed. 50cm White Hook & Loop 50cm White Hook & Loop 50cm White Hook & Loop 50cm White Hook & Loop Handy Dots Hook & Loop Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 696 4.3 out of 5 stars 696 4.3 out of 5 stars 696 4.3 out of 5 stars 696 4.3 out of 5 stars 696 Price £2.00 £ 2 . 00 £1.70 £ 1 . 70 — no data £3.10 £ 3 . 10 £2.19 £ 2 . 19 Size 2cm x 50cm 2cm x 50cm 2cm x 50cm 2 cm x 50cm 12 Pairs Colour White White White White Black & White Surface Type Soft Surfaces Hard Surfaces Soft Surfaces Hard and Soft Surfaces Hard Surfaces Application Sew On Stick On Iron On Stick & Sew Stick On Ideal For Strong Fabric to Fabric Bonds Bonding two Hard Surfaces Strong Fabric to Fabric Bonds Bonding Soft Surfaces to Hard Surfaces Bonding two Hard Surfaces
